title: LongCat-Video Technical Report
core_contribution: A unified 13.6B video generation model that natively supports long video generation through video-continuation pretraining, with multi-reward GRPO post-training for flow matching and efficient coarse-to-fine inference with 3D block sparse attention achieving 12x speedup.
summary: LongCat-Video is a 13.6B parameter Diffusion Transformer from Meituan that unifies T2V, I2V, and Video-Continuation tasks by treating all as conditional video continuation. It introduces Block Causal Attention with KV caching, improved GRPO for flow matching (interpreting GRPO as stochastic noise search), multi-reward training (VQ+MQ+TA) that prevents reward hacking, and a coarse-to-fine inference pipeline combined with 3D block sparse attention (93.75% sparsity) for 12.3x speedup. On VBench 2.0 it scores 62.11% (1st open-source) and leads all models in Commonsense (70.94%).
key_findings: 12.3x inference speedup through LCM distillation + coarse-to-fine + block sparse attention on a single H800 GPU
Multi-reward GRPO prevents reward hacking that single-reward training exhibits
3D Block Sparse Attention achieves near-lossless quality at 93.75% sparsity
70.94% on VBench 2.0 Commonsense — best across all models including Veo3
GRPO as stochastic noise search theoretical insight provides foundation for training techniques
Coarse-to-fine not only accelerates but improves quality over native 720p generation
limitations: I2V overall quality lags behind Seedance 1.0, Hailuo-02, and Wan2.2
RLHF training only uses T2V tasks — no task-specific rewards for I2V or Video-Continuation
No model quantization explored despite 13.6B parameter size
Training MFU only 33-38%, suggesting room for infrastructure optimization

infra_impact.algorithm: Novel GRPO techniques for flow matching broadly applicable to any diffusion/flow model post-training
infra_impact.kernel: Open-source 3D Block Sparse Attention in Triton with forward/backward + ring attention
infra_impact.framework: C2F inference pipeline with LoRA refinement + Block Causal Attention KV caching provide replicable recipe
infra_impact.llm: Multi-reward GRPO with weighted advantage aggregation provides template for multi-objective RLHF
infra_impact.cluster: DeepSpeed-Zero2 + Ring Attention + Context Parallelism training recipe at 13B scale

open_questions: Can the GRPO stochastic noise search framework extend to discrete token-based video generation?
What is the optimal sparsity-quality tradeoff curve for 3D Block Sparse Attention?
How to design effective task-specific rewards for I2V and Video-Continuation GRPO training?
